| **1.0.0** | 2026-06-14 | `JekyllHyde-1.0.0-app.zip` (~35 MB), `model.part00–02` (~5 GB total) | https://github.com/Benjamin5607/model_JekyllHyde/releases/tag/v1.0.0 |
